queue_entry: pattern-tools.ts + pattern-registry.ts: split catalog, execution, and language adapters

notes: src/tools/pattern-tools.ts is 322 LOC with execution, scan filters, file/symbol matching, and public search/list APIs
src/tools/pattern-registry.ts is 979 LOC with 168 built-in patterns across common, React, Kotlin, PHP/Yii, NestJS, Astro, Next.js, Hono, DB/ORM, and Python families
CodeSift complexity max=9 and hotspot scores: pattern-tools 1153776 (12 commits/1849 changed lines), pattern-registry 1958 (1 commit/979 lines)
Machine audit reports no CQ8/CQ11/CQ14/CQ17 findings and 31 CQ13 findings for private implementation symbols; hidden dead-code/clone/cycle tools unavailable

plan.summary: Keep pattern-tools.ts and pattern-registry.ts as compatibility facades; move catalog assembly, generic execution, shared types, and ten language/domain adapter registries into src/tools/patterns/.

extractions.unit: catalog merge and stable insertion order
generic indexed symbol/file scan execution and public search/list behavior

plan.dependency_impact: Existing imports and lazy loaders target pattern-tools.ts and pattern-registry.ts. Facades preserve those paths and runtime exports; execution imports catalog directly to avoid a facade cycle. No external consumer should import adapter files.
plan.existing_reuse: Reuse existing source-stripper, test-file classifier, index-tools CodeIndex types, and current registry definition type; no new scan semantics.
plan.test_strategy: Add pre-refactor characterization for registry identity/order, all ten adapter family counts, and generic search execution; run existing pattern, integration, audit, and registration suites unchanged.

test_audit_before.test_file: tests/tools/pattern-tools.test.ts; tests/tools/pattern-tools-python.test.ts; tests/integration/tools.test.ts; tests/integration/react-tier5-baseline.test.ts; tests/tools/php-tools.test.ts; tests/tools/python-audit.test.ts; tests/tools/review-diff-tools.test.ts; tests/tools/register-tools.test.ts

test_audit_after.result: 2 tests passed on PRE_REFACTOR_SHA=02b434d; registry identity/order, 168 catalog entries, all ten adapter families, and generic execution exercised

prove.findings_disposition: planned-remediation:4 execution hardening findings; catalog ownership, comments, and full-order proof resolved

notes: Post-audit CQ8, CQ11, CQ13, CQ14, and CQ17 pass on the split modules
Independent auditor verified facade identity, exact 168-key order, mutation compatibility, lazy-loader compatibility, and no cycles after remediation
Adversarial findings are reserved for the separate post-refactor execution hardening commit
